question: Can the active I-B review path prevent a future reopen packet from silently reusing the old undefended shadow threshold-transfer reference?
hypothesis: A CPU-only review-mode guard separates historical threshold-transfer diagnostics from future defended-shadow reopen packets.
falsifier: review-risk-targeted-unlearning-pilot --review-mode defended-shadow-reopen accepts a shadow reference that lacks threshold_reference=defended-shadows.

validation.command: conda run -n diffaudit-research python -m unittest tests.test_risk_targeted_unlearning tests.test_h2_adapter

next_missing_requirements: strict-tail improvement under defended-shadow threshold reference
